attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT f2mtsla.fiscal_month_id ,f2mtsla.fiscal_month_name ,f2mtsla.fiscal_month_status_ind ,f2mtsla.acts_measures_calc_date ,f2mtsla.fiscal_year_id 
			,f2mtsla.incident_id ,f2mtsla.incident_number ,f2mtsla.incident_status_id ,f2mtsla.incident_status ,f2mtsla.dw_case_activity_key ,f2mtsla.dw_crnt_keyword_key
			,f2mtsla.chg_cco_id ,f2mtsla.chg_dw_workgroup_key ,f2mtsla.chg_wkgrp_natural_key ,f2mtsla.chg_wkgrp_master_theater ,f2mtsla.activity_name ,f2mtsla.activity_addnl_info
			,f2mtsla.activity_code ,f2mtsla.activity_code_sort ,f2mtsla.activity_date ,f2mtsla.activity_date_override ,f2mtsla.acts_activity_name ,f2mtsla.acts_include_flag
			,f2mtsla.acts_tsla ,f2mtsla.acts_consistency_constant ,f2mtsla.acts_median_tsla ,f2mtsla.acts_abs_deviation_tsla ,f4.acts_median_abs_deviation_tsla 
			,(f4.acts_median_abs_deviation_tsla * f2mtsla.acts_consistency_constant) acts_median_abs_dev_threshold 
			,CASE WHEN f2mtsla.acts_abs_deviation_tsla > (f4.acts_median_abs_deviation_tsla * f2mtsla.acts_consistency_constant) THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END acts_outlier_flag
			,'MADTSLA' AS etl_phase_ind 
	FROM $$STGDB.WI_WORKTIME_F_0_MTSLA F2MTSLA 
	INNER JOIN ( SELECT fiscal_month_id ,fiscal_month_name ,fiscal_month_status_ind ,acts_measures_calc_date ,fiscal_month_start_date_adj ,fiscal_month_end_date_adj
						,x.acts_activity_name ,acts_median_tsla ,y.acts_median_abs_deviation_tsla ,etl_phase_ind 
				 FROM ( SELECT TSLA.fiscal_month_id ,TSLA.fiscal_month_name ,TSLA.fiscal_month_status_ind ,TSLA.acts_measures_calc_date ,B.fiscal_month_start_date_adj
								,B.fiscal_month_end_date_adj ,TSLA.acts_activity_name ,MEDIAN(TSLA.acts_tsla) acts_median_tsla ,'LOAD' etl_phase_ind
						FROM $$STGDB.WI_WORKTIME_F_0_TSLA TSLA 
						,(SELECT * FROM $$STGDB.WI_ACTS_CTRL WHERE fiscal_month_status_ind = 'WIP' ) B
						WHERE acts_include_flag = 'Y'
						AND TSLA.fiscal_month_id = B.fiscal_month_id
						GROUP BY 1 ,2 ,3 ,4 ,5 ,6 ,7
					 ) X
				LEFT JOIN (	SELECT ACTS_ACTIVITY_NAME ,Median(ACTS_ABS_DEVIATION_TSLA) ACTS_MEDIAN_ABS_DEVIATION_TSLA 
							FROM $$STGDB.WI_WORKTIME_F_0_MTSLA GROUP BY ACTS_ACTIVITY_NAME ) Y 
				ON X.ACTS_ACTIVITY_NAME = Y.ACTS_ACTIVITY_NAME
			) F4 
	ON F4.ACTS_ACTIVITY_NAME = F2MTSLA.ACTS_ACTIVITY_NAME

SELECT CHG_CCO_ID ,INCIDENT_ID ,INCIDENT_NUMBER ,INCIDENT_STATUS_ID ,ACTIVITY_DATE CONSOLIDATE_START_DATE ,FISCAL_MONTH_NAME 
	,LEAD(ACTIVITY_DATE, 1, '3500/01/01 00:00:00') OVER (PARTITION BY INCIDENT_NUMBER ORDER BY ACTIVITY_DATE ) - INTERVAL '1' SECOND AS CONSOLIDATE_END_DATE 
	FROM (	SELECT CHG_CCO_ID ,INCIDENT_ID ,INCIDENT_NUMBER ,ACTIVITY_DATE ,INCIDENT_STATUS_ID ,FISCAL_MONTH_NAME 
			FROM (	SELECT CHG_CCO_ID ,INCIDENT_ID ,INCIDENT_NUMBER ,ACTIVITY_DATE ,INCIDENT_STATUS_ID ,FISCAL_MONTH_NAME 
						   ,LAG(ACTIVITY_DATE, 1, '1900-01-01 00:00:00') OVER (PARTITION BY CHG_CCO_ID ,INCIDENT_NUMBER ORDER BY CHG_CCO_ID ,INCIDENT_NUMBER ,ACTIVITY_DATE
								) LAST_ACTIVITY_DATE
					FROM $$STGDB.WI_WORKTIME_F_0_INIT
				) A
			WHERE (((CAST((CAST(A.ACTIVITY_DATE AS DATE) - CAST(A.LAST_ACTIVITY_DATE AS DATE)) AS DECIMAL(38, 15)) * 60 * 60 * 24) + 
			((EXTRACT(HOUR FROM A.ACTIVITY_DATE) - EXTRACT(HOUR FROM A.LAST_ACTIVITY_DATE)) * 60 * 60) + 
			((EXTRACT(MINUTE FROM A.ACTIVITY_DATE) - EXTRACT(MINUTE FROM A.LAST_ACTIVITY_DATE)) * 60) + 
			(EXTRACT(SECOND FROM A.ACTIVITY_DATE) - EXTRACT(SECOND FROM A.LAST_ACTIVITY_DATE)))) > 5
		) B

SELECT f2consol.fiscal_month_id ,f2consol.fiscal_month_name ,f2consol.fiscal_month_status_ind ,f2consol.acts_measures_calc_date ,f2consol.fiscal_year_id
			,f2consol.incident_id ,f2consol.incident_number ,f2consol.incident_status_id ,f2consol.incident_status ,f2consol.dw_case_activity_key ,f2consol.dw_crnt_keyword_key
			,f2consol.chg_cco_id ,f2consol.chg_dw_workgroup_key ,f2consol.chg_wkgrp_natural_key ,f2consol.chg_wkgrp_master_theater ,f2consol.activity_name 
			,f2consol.activity_addnl_info ,f2consol.activity_code ,f2consol.activity_code_sort ,f2consol.activity_date ,f2consol.activity_date_override ,f2consol.acts_activity_name
			,(((CAST((CAST(f2consol.activity_date_override AS DATE) - CAST(pa.last_activity_date AS DATE)) AS DECIMAL(38, 15)) * 60 * 60 * 24) + ((EXTRACT(HOUR FROM f2consol.activity_date_override) - EXTRACT(HOUR FROM pa.last_activity_date)) * 60 * 60) + ((EXTRACT(MINUTE FROM f2consol.activity_date_override) - EXTRACT(MINUTE FROM pa.last_activity_date)) * 60) + (EXTRACT(SECOND FROM f2consol.activity_date_override) - EXTRACT(SECOND FROM pa.last_activity_date))) / 60) AS time_difference
			,CASE WHEN f2consol.acts_include_flag = 'N' OR pa.last_chg_cco_id <> f2consol.chg_cco_id OR coalesce((((cast(cast(activity_date_override AS DATE) - cast(last_activity_date AS DATE) AS DECIMAL(38, 15))) * 60 * 60 * 24) + ((extract(hour FROM activity_date_override) - extract(hour FROM last_activity_date)) * 60 * 60) + ((extract(MINUTE FROM activity_date_override) - extract(MINUTE FROM last_activity_date)) * 60) + ((extract(SECOND FROM activity_date_override) - extract(SECOND FROM last_activity_date)))), 0) = 0
			OR f2consol.chg_wkgrp_master_theater NOT IN ( 'GLOBAL_TAC HTTS' ,'HTTS' ,'GLOBAL_TAC' ,'Theater Delivery Model' ) THEN 'N'
				ELSE 'Y' END acts_include_flag
			,cast(CASE 
					WHEN pa.last_chg_cco_id <> f2consol.chg_cco_id
				THEN 0
			ELSE (((CAST((CAST(f2consol.activity_date_override AS DATE) - CAST(pa.last_activity_date AS DATE)) AS DECIMAL(38, 15)) * 60 * 60 * 24) + ((EXTRACT(HOUR FROM f2consol.activity_date_override) - EXTRACT(HOUR FROM pa.last_activity_date)) * 60 * 60) + ((EXTRACT(MINUTE FROM f2consol.activity_date_override) - EXTRACT(MINUTE FROM pa.last_activity_date)) * 60) + (EXTRACT(SECOND FROM f2consol.activity_date_override) - EXTRACT(SECOND FROM pa.last_activity_date))) / 60)
			END AS DECIMAL(38, 15)) acts_tsla --- this is in minutes
			,'TSLA' etl_phase_ind 
	FROM $$STGDB.WI_WORKTIME_F_0_CONSOL f2consol 
	INNER JOIN (SELECT dw_case_activity_key ,incident_status_id ,lag(chg_cco_id, 1, 'begin') OVER (ORDER BY chg_cco_id ,activity_date_override ,activity_code_sort
				,dw_case_activity_key) last_chg_cco_id
				,lag(activity_date_override, 1, cast('1900-01-01 00:00:00' AS TIMESTAMP (0))) OVER (ORDER BY chg_cco_id ,activity_date_override ,activity_code_sort
				,dw_case_activity_key) last_activity_date
				FROM $$STGDB.WI_WORKTIME_F_0_CONSOL
	) pa 
	ON pa.dw_case_activity_key = f2consol.dw_case_activity_key

SELECT FISCAL_MONTH_ID ,FISCAL_MONTH_NAME ,FISCAL_MONTH_STATUS_IND ,ACTS_MEASURES_CALC_DATE ,FISCAL_YEAR_ID ,INCIDENT_ID ,INCIDENT_NUMBER ,INCIDENT_STATUS_ID
		   ,INCIDENT_STATUS ,DW_CASE_ACTIVITY_KEY ,DW_CRNT_KEYWORD_KEY ,CHG_CCO_ID ,CHG_DW_WORKGROUP_KEY ,Y.CHG_WKGRP_NATURAL_KEY ,CHG_WKGRP_MASTER_THEATER
		   ,ACTIVITY_NAME ,ACTIVITY_ADDNL_INFO ,ACTIVITY_CODE ,ACTIVITY_CODE_SORT ,ACTIVITY_DATE 
		   ,CASE WHEN X.ACTS_ACTIVITY_NAME IS NOT NULL THEN 'Notes: Other' ELSE Y.ACTS_ACTIVITY_NAME END AS ACTS_ACTIVITY_NAME
		   ,ACTS_INCLUDE_FLAG ,ETL_PHASE_IND 
	FROM $$STGDB.WI_WORKTIME_F_0_INIT_0 Y 
	LEFT JOIN (SELECT ACTS_ACTIVITY_NAME FROM $$STGDB.WI_WORKTIME_F_0_INIT_0 WHERE ACTIVITY_CODE = 1700 GROUP BY ACTS_ACTIVITY_NAME HAVING COUNT(1) < 100) X 
	ON Y.ACTS_ACTIVITY_NAME = X.ACTS_ACTIVITY_NAME

SELECT f2madtsla.fiscal_month_id ,f2madtsla.fiscal_month_name ,f2madtsla.fiscal_month_status_ind ,f2madtsla.acts_measures_calc_date ,f2madtsla.fiscal_year_id
	,f2madtsla.incident_id ,f2madtsla.incident_number ,f2madtsla.incident_status_id ,f2madtsla.incident_status ,- 999 AS bl_incident_key ,f2madtsla.dw_case_activity_key
	,f2madtsla.dw_crnt_keyword_key ,f2madtsla.chg_cco_id ,f2madtsla.chg_dw_workgroup_key ,f2madtsla.chg_wkgrp_natural_key ,w.workgroup_name chg_wkgrp_name
	,w.tac_center_name chg_wkgrp_tac_center_name ,w.theater_name chg_wkgrp_theater_name ,f2madtsla.chg_wkgrp_master_theater ,w.DELIVERY_CHANNEL_TYPE chg_wkgrp_delivery_channel
	,f2madtsla.activity_name ,f2madtsla.activity_addnl_info ,f2madtsla.activity_code ,f2madtsla.activity_date ,f2madtsla.acts_activity_name ,f2madtsla.acts_tsla
	,f2madtsla.acts_consistency_constant ,f2madtsla.acts_median_tsla ,f2madtsla.acts_abs_deviation_tsla ,f2madtsla.acts_median_abs_deviation_tsla 
	,f2madtsla.acts_median_abs_dev_threshold ,f2madtsla.acts_outlier_flag ,f4.acts_mean_non_outlier_tsla 
	,CASE WHEN f2madtsla.acts_outlier_flag = 'Y' THEN f4.acts_mean_non_outlier_tsla ELSE f2madtsla.acts_tsla END acts_worktime
	FROM $$STGDB.WI_WORKTIME_F_0_MADTSLA f2madtsla 
	LEFT JOIN (SELECT * FROM $$STGDB.WI_ACTS_CTRL WHERE FISCAL_MONTH_STATUS_IND = 'WIP' ) B 
	ON B.FISCAL_MONTH_STATUS_IND = 'WIP' 
	INNER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_WORKTIME_F_3_AMNOTSLA f4 
	ON f4.acts_activity_name = f2madtsla.acts_activity_name 
	INNER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_workgroup_d w 
	ON w.natural_key = f2madtsla.chg_wkgrp_natural_key 
	LEFT JOIN $$STGDB.WI_ACTS_TSLA_WORKTIME_F_W trash 
	ON f2madtsla.chg_dw_workgroup_key = trash.dw_workgroup_key
	AND f2madtsla.fiscal_month_id = trash.fiscal_month_id 
	WHERE cast(f2madtsla.activity_date AS DATE) >=B.FISCAL_MONTH_START_DATE
	AND cast(f2madtsla.activity_date AS DATE) <= B.FISCAL_MONTH_END_DATE

SELECT FISCAL_MONTH_ID 	,X.FISCAL_MONTH_NAME ,FISCAL_MONTH_STATUS_IND ,ACTS_MEASURES_CALC_DATE ,FISCAL_MONTH_START_DATE_ADJ AS ACTS_MEASURES_START_DATE
		  ,FISCAL_MONTH_END_DATE_ADJ AS ACTS_MEASURES_END_DATE ,X.ACTS_ACTIVITY_NAME ,ACTS_MEDIAN_TSLA ,ACTS_MEDIAN_ABS_DEVIATION_TSLA ,Y.ACTS_MEAN_NON_OUTLIER_TSLA 
	FROM ( SELECT FISCAL_MONTH_ID ,FISCAL_MONTH_NAME ,FISCAL_MONTH_STATUS_IND ,ACTS_MEASURES_CALC_DATE ,FISCAL_MONTH_START_DATE_ADJ ,FISCAL_MONTH_END_DATE_ADJ
				,X.ACTS_ACTIVITY_NAME ,ACTS_MEDIAN_TSLA ,Y.ACTS_MEDIAN_ABS_DEVIATION_TSLA ,ETL_PHASE_IND 
			FROM ( SELECT TSLA.FISCAL_MONTH_ID ,TSLA.FISCAL_MONTH_NAME ,TSLA.FISCAL_MONTH_STATUS_IND ,TSLA.ACTS_MEASURES_CALC_DATE ,B.FISCAL_MONTH_START_DATE_ADJ
						,B.FISCAL_MONTH_END_DATE_ADJ ,TSLA.ACTS_ACTIVITY_NAME ,MEDIAN(TSLA.ACTS_TSLA) ACTS_MEDIAN_TSLA ,'LOAD' ETL_PHASE_IND
					FROM $$STGDB.WI_WORKTIME_F_0_TSLA TSLA 
					,(SELECT * FROM $$STGDB.WI_ACTS_CTRL WHERE FISCAL_MONTH_STATUS_IND = 'WIP' ) B
					WHERE ACTS_INCLUDE_FLAG = 'Y'
					AND TSLA.FISCAL_MONTH_ID = B.FISCAL_MONTH_ID
					GROUP BY 1 ,2 ,3 ,4 ,5 ,6 ,7 
				) X
			LEFT JOIN (SELECT ACTS_ACTIVITY_NAME ,MEDIAN(ACTS_ABS_DEVIATION_TSLA) ACTS_MEDIAN_ABS_DEVIATION_TSLA FROM $$STGDB.WI_WORKTIME_F_0_MTSLA GROUP BY ACTS_ACTIVITY_NAME) Y 
			ON X.ACTS_ACTIVITY_NAME = Y.ACTS_ACTIVITY_NAME
		) X 
	LEFT JOIN (SELECT ACTS_ACTIVITY_NAME ,AVG(ACTS_TSLA) ACTS_MEAN_NON_OUTLIER_TSLA FROM $$STGDB.WI_WORKTIME_F_0_MADTSLA WHERE ACTS_OUTLIER_FLAG = 'N' GROUP BY ACTS_ACTIVITY_NAME) Y 
	ON X.ACTS_ACTIVITY_NAME = Y.ACTS_ACTIVITY_NAME

SELECT DISTINCT B.FISCAL_MONTH_ID ,B.FISCAL_MONTH_NAME ,B.FISCAL_MONTH_STATUS_IND 
		   ,CAST(B.FISCAL_MONTH_END_DATE_ADJ AS TIMESTAMP (0)) AS ACTS_MEASURES_CALC_DATE
		   ,B.FISCAL_YEAR_ID ,CAL.INCIDENT_ID ,CAL.INCIDENT_NUMBER ,CAL.INCIDENT_STATUS_ID ,CAL.INCIDENT_STATUS ,CAL.DW_CASE_ACTIVITY_KEY ,CAL.DW_CRNT_KEYWORD_KEY
		   ,CAL.CHG_CCO_ID ,CAL.CHG_DW_WORKGROUP_KEY ,WKGP.SK_NATURAL_KEY_INT CHG_WKGRP_NATURAL_KEY ,WKGP.MASTER_THEATER_NAME CHG_WKGRP_MASTER_THEATER 
		   ,CAL.ACTIVITY_NAME ,CAL.ACTIVITY_ADDNL_INFO ,CAL.ACTIVITY_CODE 
		   ,CASE WHEN CAL.ACTIVITY_CODE = 300 THEN 1 WHEN CAL.ACTIVITY_CODE = 3500 THEN 2
		   	WHEN CAL.ACTIVITY_CODE = 3400 THEN 3 WHEN CAL.ACTIVITY_CODE = 1800 THEN 4
		   	WHEN CAL.ACTIVITY_CODE = 100 THEN 5 WHEN CAL.ACTIVITY_CODE = 9200 THEN 6
		   	WHEN CAL.ACTIVITY_CODE = 10500 THEN 7 WHEN CAL.ACTIVITY_CODE = 10600 THEN 8
		   	WHEN CAL.ACTIVITY_CODE = 4100 THEN 9 WHEN CAL.ACTIVITY_CODE = 200 THEN 10
		   	WHEN CAL.ACTIVITY_CODE = 600 THEN 11 WHEN CAL.ACTIVITY_CODE = 2400 THEN 12
		   	WHEN CAL.ACTIVITY_CODE = 1100 THEN 13 WHEN CAL.ACTIVITY_CODE = 900 THEN 14
		   	WHEN CAL.ACTIVITY_CODE = 1700 THEN 15 ELSE 999  
		   END ACTIVITY_CODE_SORT
		   ,CAL.ACTIVITY_DATE ,CASE WHEN CAL.ACTIVITY_CODE = 1700 THEN CONCAT ('Notes: ' ,cal.note_type )
		   						WHEN CAL.ACTIVITY_NAME = 'Change Status' THEN CONCAT ('Change Status: ' ,cal.incident_status)
		   						ELSE CAL.ACTIVITY_NAME
		   					END ACTS_ACTIVITY_NAME
		   ,CASE WHEN CAL.ACTIVITY_DATE >=CAST(B.FISCAL_MONTH_START_DATE_ADJ AS TIMESTAMP (0)) 
		   AND CAL.ACTIVITY_DATE<=CAST(B.FISCAL_MONTH_END_DATE_ADJ AS TIMESTAMP (0)) THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' 
		   END ACTS_INCLUDE_FLAG
		   ,'INIT' ETL_PHASE_IND 
	FROM $$STGDB.WI_CASE_ACTIVITY_LOG_F CAL -- CHANGE TO ORIGINAL TABLE
	LEFT JOIN (SELECT * FROM $$STGDB.WI_ACTS_CTRL WHERE FISCAL_MONTH_STATUS_IND = 'WIP' ) B 
	ON B.FISCAL_MONTH_STATUS_IND = 'WIP' 
	INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_SR_WORKGROUP_ACTS_SNAPSHOT WKGP 
	ON (CASE WHEN BK_FSCL_MTH_NUM_INT > 9 THEN TRIM(BK_FSCL_YR_NUM_INT) || TRIM(BK_FSCL_MTH_NUM_INT) 
			 ELSE TRIM(BK_FSCL_YR_NUM_INT) || '0' || TRIM(BK_FSCL_MTH_NUM_INT) 
		END = B.FISCAL_MONTH_ID
		AND WKGP.SK_DW_WG_KEY_INT = CAL.CHG_DW_WORKGROUP_KEY
		) 
	INNER JOIN (SELECT INCIDENT_NUMBER FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_TSS_INCIDENTS_CURRENT_F WHERE INCIDENT_TYPE IN ('SMB' ,'TAC-B2B' ,'ANC' ,'TAC')) F1 
	ON F1.INCIDENT_NUMBER = CAL.INCIDENT_NUMBER 
	WHERE CAL.ACTIVITY_DATE >= CAST(B.PREV_MONTH_START_DATE_ADJ AS TIMESTAMP (0))
	AND CAL.ACTIVITY_DATE <= CAST(B.FISCAL_MONTH_END_DATE_ADJ AS TIMESTAMP (0))
	AND CAL.ACTIVITY_CODE <> 100
	AND NOT (CAL.ACTIVITY_CODE = 300 AND UPPER(CAL.INCIDENT_STATUS) IN ('CUSTOMER UPDATED' ,'CUSTOMER REQUESTED CLOSURE' ,'CUST REQUESTED CLOSURE-NOOWNER' ,'NEW') )
	AND NOT (CAL.ACTIVITY_CODE = 1700 AND UPPER(CAL.NOTE_TYPE) IN ('CISCO_CASE_REVIEW' ,'CISCO_DUTY_MNGR' ,'CISCO_ENTITLEMENT' ,'CISCO_MANAGER_REV' ,'CISCO_RM_ACTION'
																	,'CISCO_SERV_ORDER' ,'CISCO_SPEC_HANDLE_INSTRUCTIONS' ,'CISCO_WEB_SOLUTION' ,'CISCO_WEB_UPDATE'
																	,'CISCO_WEB_UPDATE_FAILED' ,'INTEGRATION_EXCEPTION' ,'CISCO_RR' ,'CISCO_ORDER_CREATION' ,'CISCO_ANC_AA'
																	,'CISCO_B2B_UPDATED' ,'CISCO_GOLDEN_RULES' ,'CISCO_ORDER_DISPATCHED' ,'CISCO_TPM' ,'CISCO_WEB_REQUEUE'
																	,'CISCO_WEB_TICKET' ,'HTE- NOTE' ,'TASK_TRACKING_DET' ) 
			)
	AND NOT (CAL.ACTIVITY_CODE = 1100 AND UPPER(CAL.PDA_CURRENT_OWNER_GROUP_NAME) IN ('WW-SCHEDULED-RESPONSE' ,'WW-SCHEDULED RESPONSE' ,'CRC-GLOBAL' ) 
	AND CAL.CURRENT_OWNER_GROUP_NAME = 'UNDISPATCHED' )

SELECT F2INIT.FISCAL_MONTH_ID ,F2INIT.FISCAL_MONTH_NAME ,F2INIT.FISCAL_MONTH_STATUS_IND ,F2INIT.ACTS_MEASURES_CALC_DATE ,F2INIT.FISCAL_YEAR_ID ,F2INIT.INCIDENT_ID
			,F2INIT.INCIDENT_NUMBER ,F2INIT.INCIDENT_STATUS_ID ,F2INIT.INCIDENT_STATUS ,F2INIT.DW_CASE_ACTIVITY_KEY ,F2INIT.DW_CRNT_KEYWORD_KEY ,F2INIT.CHG_CCO_ID
			,F2INIT.CHG_DW_WORKGROUP_KEY ,F2INIT.CHG_WKGRP_NATURAL_KEY ,F2INIT.CHG_WKGRP_MASTER_THEATER ,F2INIT.ACTIVITY_NAME ,F2INIT.ACTIVITY_ADDNL_INFO ,F2INIT.ACTIVITY_CODE
			,F2INIT.ACTIVITY_CODE_SORT ,F2INIT.ACTIVITY_DATE ,F3.CONSOLIDATE_START_DATE ACTIVITY_DATE_OVERRIDE ,F2INIT.ACTS_ACTIVITY_NAME ,F2INIT.ACTS_INCLUDE_FLAG 
			,'CONSOL' ETL_PHASE_IND 
	FROM $$STGDB.WI_WORKTIME_F_0_INIT F2INIT 
	JOIN $$STGDB.WI_WORKTIME_F_1 F3 
	ON (F3.CHG_CCO_ID = F2INIT.CHG_CCO_ID AND F3.INCIDENT_NUMBER = F2INIT.INCIDENT_NUMBER AND F2INIT.ACTIVITY_DATE >= F3.CONSOLIDATE_START_DATE 
	AND F2INIT.ACTIVITY_DATE <= F3.CONSOLIDATE_END_DATE)

SELECT F2TSLA.FISCAL_MONTH_ID ,F2TSLA.FISCAL_MONTH_NAME ,F2TSLA.FISCAL_MONTH_STATUS_IND ,F2TSLA.ACTS_MEASURES_CALC_DATE ,F2TSLA.FISCAL_YEAR_ID ,F2TSLA.INCIDENT_ID
	,F2TSLA.INCIDENT_NUMBER ,F2TSLA.INCIDENT_STATUS_ID ,F2TSLA.INCIDENT_STATUS ,F2TSLA.DW_CASE_ACTIVITY_KEY ,F2TSLA.DW_CRNT_KEYWORD_KEY ,F2TSLA.CHG_CCO_ID 
	,F2TSLA.CHG_DW_WORKGROUP_KEY ,F2TSLA.CHG_WKGRP_NATURAL_KEY ,F2TSLA.CHG_WKGRP_MASTER_THEATER ,F2TSLA.ACTIVITY_NAME ,F2TSLA.ACTIVITY_ADDNL_INFO ,F2TSLA.ACTIVITY_CODE
	,F2TSLA.ACTIVITY_CODE_SORT ,F2TSLA.ACTIVITY_DATE ,F2TSLA.ACTIVITY_DATE_OVERRIDE ,F2TSLA.ACTS_ACTIVITY_NAME ,F2TSLA.ACTS_INCLUDE_FLAG ,F2TSLA.ACTS_TSLA
	,CASE WHEN f2tsla.acts_activity_name IN ('Notes: CISCO_ATTACH_ADD' ,'Notes: CISCO_ATTACH_DELETE' ,'Notes: CISCO_BU_ESCALATION' 	,'Notes: CISCO_INIT_EMAIL'
				,'Notes: HTE NOTES' ,'Notes: TASK_TRACKING_DET' ,'Notes: CISCO_TPM' ,'Notes: CISCO_EMAIL_IN' ,'Change Status: Customer Pending' ) THEN 15
		WHEN f2tsla.acts_activity_name IN ('Notes: RMA STATUS') THEN 5 ELSE 25
		END acts_consistency_constant
	,f4.acts_median_tsla ,abs(f2tsla.acts_tsla - f4.acts_median_tsla) acts_abs_deviation_tsla ,'MTSLA' AS etl_phase_ind 
	FROM $$STGDB.WI_WORKTIME_F_0_TSLA f2tsla 
	INNER JOIN (SELECT TSLA.fiscal_month_id ,TSLA.fiscal_month_name ,TSLA.fiscal_month_status_ind ,TSLA.acts_measures_calc_date ,B.fiscal_month_start_date_adj
				,B.fiscal_month_end_date_adj ,TSLA.acts_activity_name ,MEDIAN(TSLA.acts_tsla) acts_median_tsla ,'LOAD' etl_phase_ind 
				FROM $$STGDB.WI_WORKTIME_F_0_TSLA TSLA 
				,(SELECT * FROM $$STGDB.WI_ACTS_CTRL WHERE fiscal_month_status_ind = 'WIP' ) B
				WHERE acts_include_flag = 'Y'
				AND TSLA.fiscal_month_id = B.fiscal_month_id
				GROUP BY 1 ,2 ,3 ,4 ,5 ,6 ,7
		) f4 
	ON f4.acts_activity_name = f2tsla.acts_activity_name WHERE f2tsla.acts_include_flag = 'Y'

SELECT B.FISCAL_MONTH_ID ,B.FISCAL_MONTH_NAME ,CAL.CHG_DW_WORKGROUP_KEY AS DW_WORKGROUP_KEY 
	FROM $$STGDB.WI_CASE_ACTIVITY_LOG_F CAL, 
	(SELECT * FROM $$STGDB.WI_ACTS_CTRL WHERE FISCAL_MONTH_STATUS_IND = 'WIP' ) B 
	WHERE CAL.ACTIVITY_DATE >= B.FISCAL_MONTH_START_DATE
	AND CAL.ACTIVITY_DATE <= B.FISCAL_MONTH_END_DATE
	AND CHG_DW_WORKGROUP_KEY IN ( SELECT SK_DW_WG_KEY_INT AS DW_WORKGROUP_KEY
									FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_SR_WORKGROUP_ACTS_SNAPSHOT A
									,(SELECT * FROM $$STGDB.WI_ACTS_CTRL WHERE FISCAL_MONTH_STATUS_IND = 'WIP' ) B
									WHERE CASE WHEN A.BK_FSCL_MTH_NUM_INT > 9 THEN TRIM(A.BK_FSCL_YR_NUM_INT) || TRIM(A.BK_FSCL_MTH_NUM_INT)
												ELSE TRIM(A.BK_FSCL_YR_NUM_INT) || '0' || TRIM(A.BK_FSCL_MTH_NUM_INT) END = B.FISCAL_MONTH_ID	
									AND UPPER(MASTER_THEATER_NAME) IN ('GLOBAL_TAC HTTS' ,'HTTS' ,'GLOBAL_TAC' ,'THEATER DELIVERY MODEL') 
									MINUS
									SELECT SK_DW_WG_KEY_INT DW_WORKGROUP_KEY
									FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_SR_WORKGROUP_ACTS_SNAPSHOT A	
									,(SELECT * FROM $$STGDB.WI_ACTS_CTRL WHERE FISCAL_MONTH_STATUS_IND = 'CLOSED') B
									WHERE CASE WHEN BK_FSCL_MTH_NUM_INT > 9 THEN TRIM(BK_FSCL_YR_NUM_INT) || TRIM(BK_FSCL_MTH_NUM_INT)
												ELSE TRIM(BK_FSCL_YR_NUM_INT) || '0' || TRIM(BK_FSCL_MTH_NUM_INT)
												END = B.FISCAL_MONTH_ID
									AND UPPER(MASTER_THEATER_NAME) IN ('GLOBAL_TAC HTTS' ,'HTTS' ,'GLOBAL_TAC' ,'THEATER DELIVERY MODEL')
								) GROUP BY 1 ,2 ,3
